pi_items.source: Academic literature on Edema Index (EI) / Peritumoral Edema Index (PEI) in Gliomas (e.g., Steinvorth et al., 1997; various clinical neuro-oncology studies)

privileged_info_summary: The BraTS 2021 dataset uses specific segmentation labels: Label 1 for the necrotic and non-enhancing tumor core (NCR/NET), Label 2 for peritumoral edema (ED), and Label 4 for the GD-enhancing tumor (ET). The Peritumoral Edema Index (PEI) is classified using the following thresholds: Low/Grade I (PEI < 2.0), Moderate/Grade II (2.0 ≤ PEI < 4.0), and High/Grade III (PEI ≥ 4.0).
